feed.title: Maine Board of Bar Examiners — Announcements
feed.subtitle: Bar-admission announcements from the Board of Bar Examiners (application fee changes, exam registration deadlines, Bar Admission Rule amendments, character-and-fitness notices). The page is a single prose article with dated entries and no repeating item container, and the site's WordPress /feed/ carries no posts, so it is monitored by full-page fingerprint.

entry.title: Monitoring started: Maine Board of Bar Examiners — Announcements
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
